properties.name: app.reporting.auto-hide-threshold
properties.description: Auto-hide threshold for question reporting signals.

properties.name: auth.service.base-url
properties.description: Base URL to call auth_service internal APIs.

properties.name: auth.events.exchange
properties.description: RabbitMQ exchange for auth profile synchronization events.

properties.name: auth.events.user-profile-sync-routing-key
properties.description: Routing key used to bind user profile sync events from auth service.

properties.name: auth.events.user-profile-sync.queue
properties.description: Queue name receiving user profile synchronization events for exam service.
